name: TA Savannah (TravelCenters of America #177)
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-95 Exit 87 (US-17) with 24-hour diesel, 222 truck spaces, 9 fuel lanes, 8 showers, 6 service bays, a CAT scale, laundry and Fuddruckers/Popeyes.

name: El Cheapo (Richmond Hill)
description: Independent fuel/truck stop on US-17 at I-95 Exit 87 with diesel lanes, about 25 truck spaces, showers, scales, tire repair and a truck wash (exact street number unverified).

name: Love's Travel Stop #338
description: Love's at I-95 Exit 90 (GA-144) with 24-hour diesel, about 90 truck spaces, 8 diesel lanes, showers, a CAT scale, McDonald's and an RV dump.

name: Love's Travel Stop #893
description: Newer Love's near I-95 Exit 94 at GA-307/Sonny Perdue Dr in Garden City with 24-hour diesel, about 97 truck spaces, 8 fuel lanes, 6 showers, a CAT scale and Hardee's.

name: Parker's Kitchen #69
description: Parker's convenience/fuel location serving trucks near I-95 in Pooler with 24-hour diesel, bulk DEF, a deli/fast food and a reported CAT scale (exact exit/address unverified).

name: Pilot Travel Center #71
description: Pilot travel center at I-95 Exit 109 (GA-21) with 24-hour diesel, 112 truck spaces, 8 fuel lanes, 8 showers, 2 service bays, a CAT scale, laundry and an on-site Southern Tire Mart.

name: CAT Scale at TA Savannah
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at TA Savannah at I-95 Exit 87.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Richmond Hill (#338)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's #338 at I-95 Exit 90.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Garden City (#893)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's #893 near I-95 Exit 94 (GA-307) in Garden City.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Port Wentworth (#71)
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #71 at I-95 Exit 109.

name: Southern Tire Mart - Pooler
description: Commercial truck tire dealer/service near I-95 Exit 102 (US-80) in Pooler with new/retread OTR tires, truck & trailer service and 24/7 roadside.

name: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot - Port Wentworth
description: Southern Tire Mart commercial tire/DOT-inspection service co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-95 Exit 109 in Port Wentworth.

name: Snider Fleet Solutions - Savannah
description: Commercial tire dealer, retreads and mechanical/roadside service in the Garden City/Savannah port area serving the I-95 corridor (several miles east of I-95), with 24/7 emergency road service.

name: CMJ Truck Wash
description: Semi/tractor-trailer wash near I-95 Exit 109 in Port Wentworth (Grange Rd/port area).

name: I-95 Weigh Station - Port Wentworth
description: Georgia DOT/DPS weigh and inspection station on I-95 near Port Wentworth (about MM 110, just south of the state Welcome Center); a southbound truck scale, generally Mon-Fri, with a companion northbound facility nearby.

name: Georgia Welcome Center (Savannah) - I-95 SB
description: GDOT Welcome Center / rest area on southbound I-95 at about mile marker 111 near the SC line in Port Wentworth, with separate truck and car parking, 24-hour restrooms and an info desk.

name: Carson Safety Rest Area - I-95 NB
description: GDOT safety rest area on northbound I-95 near Port Wentworth, open 24/7 year-round, with separate car and truck parking (limited truck spots), restrooms and vending.

name: Tim's Towing & Recovery
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing/recovery (60-ton wreckers, rotator) serving I-95 and the Savannah metro since 1974.

name: Sapp's Wrecker Service
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing and recovery serving the Savannah area and the I-95 corridor.

name: Savannah Technical College - Commercial Truck Driving (CDL)
description: ELDT-certified CDL Class A program serving the Savannah/I-95 region, with behind-the-wheel training at the Effingham (Rincon) and Liberty (Hinesville) campuses near the corridor.
